custom.answer: Ask me about the garage conveyor…

props.placeholder: What's going on with the conveyor?

config.script:
# Gateway-scope: read live PLC tags, POST to the MIRA /ask service over Tailscale.
	# Same contract as the ConvSimpleLive AskMira view; seeded by the panel fault question.
	# Logs the request + response (incl. citations) to FactoryLM.Mira.Ask for run debugging.
	log = system.util.getLogger("FactoryLM.Mira.Ask")
	self.view.custom.busy = True
	paths = ["[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_frequency","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_freq_sp","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_current","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_dc_bus","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_cmd_word","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_status_word","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_fault_code","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/vfd_comm_ok","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/VFD/pe_latched","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/Inputs/DI_02","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/Inputs/DI_05","[default]MIRA_IOCheck/Outputs/DO_02"]
	keys = ["vfd_frequency","vfd_freq_sp","vfd_current","vfd_dc_bus","vfd_cmd_word","vfd_status_word","vfd_fault_code","vfd_comm_ok","pe_latched","e_stop","pe_beam","mlc"]
	qvs = system.tag.readBlocking(paths)
	tags = {}
	for i in range(len(keys)):
		try:
			tags[keys[i]] = qvs[i].value
		except:
			pass
	question_text = self.getSibling('question_input').props.text or ""
	try:
		sid_base = self.session.props.id
	except:
		sid_base = ""
	sid = sid_base + "-" + str(int(system.date.now().getTime()))
	# UNS-bound, HMAC-signed direct-connection call via the mira_chat project script:
	# POST /api/v1/ignition/chat with Northwind tenant + CV-200 asset_id + asset_context
	# (asset_context -> direct_connection, no chat-gate) per PR #2362 handoff section 8.
	log.info("ASK send q=%r tags=%d" % (question_text[:140], len(tags)))
	try:
		data = mira_chat.ask(question_text, tags, log)
		ans = data.get("answer", "(no answer field)")
		self.view.custom.answer = ans
		srcs = data.get("sources", data.get("citations", None))
		nsrc = len(srcs) if srcs else 0
		log.info("ASK ok answer_len=%d sources=%d keys=%s" % (len(str(ans)), nsrc, str(list(data.keys()))))
		if nsrc == 0:
			log.warn("ASK ungrounded: no sources/citations in response. raw_keys=%s" % str(list(data.keys())))
	except Exception as e:
		self.view.custom.answer = "Error contacting MIRA: " + str(e)
		log.warn("ASK error: " + str(e))
	finally:
		self.view.custom.busy = False
